title: Sorting items within a group
excerpt:

Before the update in early January there was an option to sort items only within a group and not affect the items in the rest of the groups.

posts.author: Ster (Slava)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Before the update in early January there was an option to sort items only within a group and not affect the items in the rest of the groups.
There was even a discussion in the Community regarding the feature :

Sorting Groups Separately Feature requests
@TaylorTedesco The has been progress on this since my last post. Sorting groups differently, is now possible when you are using the Main Table. Each group can be sorted by a single column. To save a sort to a group: Make sure you are using the Main Table view. Sort the column you want by clicking the blue double arrow icon that appears when you hover over the column headings. Click “save sort for this group” in the column heading submenu as show below: [image] Jim - Subscribe to: The Monda…

Why was this feature removed?

This updates makes one of my main tables absolutely unusable! Now I need to sort the whole table and then manually change the order in all the groups except one!

Does anyone else miss the feature?

posts.author: TaylorTedesco (Taylor Tedesco)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d like to know too. That original response was to me lol and I’d love to be able to use it again!
